description: Simulation-only cross-project training tasks that exercise discovery, solution planning, publish preparation, and commit/push readiness against registered projects.

scenarios.task: Modify the agentMIM home page to include a footer subscription prompt and prepare the change for commit/push.
expected_outcome: propose a minimal homepage/footer edit plan
prepare a commit message and publish checklist

scenarios.task: Triage a homepage subscription form regression from partial operator feedback and prepare a safe patch-and-publish plan.
Review the coaching app landing flow for a small marketing footer addition and prepare a commit-ready change package.
expected_outcome: flag any regression or styling risks
produce commit and publish readiness notes

scenarios.task: Simulate operator-facing engineering support for a content tweak request and prepare a publish-safe plan without making changes.
expected_outcome: prepare branch, commit, and verification notes
